title: Images of Apartheid: Filmmaking on the Fringe in the Old South Africa
original_title: Images of Apartheid: Filmmaking on the Fringe in the Old South Africa
overview: New historical documentary on the largely unknown period of South African B-movies, and the later cinematic identity of the nation that was established under the apartheid regime.
